slogans: Target the corners. Make them move.
Vary your serve placement. Keep them guessing.
Use your serve to set up the point.
First serve percentage is key right now.
Attack their backhand with your serve.
Go for the ace. You've got the power.
Serve and volley. Take control early.
Mix up your pace. Keep them off balance.
Place it wide. Open up the court.
Second serve with confidence. No fear.
Slice it out wide. Create angles.
Kick serve to their backhand. Force the error.
Body serve. Take away their timing.
Flat serve down the T. Pure power.
Use the wind. Let it work for you.
Serve to their weakness. Exploit it.
